## Scope check

- [ ] This PR is scoped to one issue or one clear improvement.
- [ ] No broad repo rewrite is included.
- [ ] No placeholder code or placeholder docs are included.
- [ ] Generated outputs are only changed if the issue asks for them.

## Data safety

- [ ] No secrets or private company data added.
- [ ] Sample data is synthetic, anonymized, template-only, or publicly sourced with clear notes.
- [ ] Paid APIs remain optional.

## Checks

- [ ] README or docs updated if behavior changed.
- [ ] Tests or validation notes updated where relevant.
- [ ] `git diff --check` passes.
